summary: Verified that the description field is already fully removed from the Project entity across all backend layers: type definitions (Project, ProjectIndexEntry, CreateProjectRequest, UpdateProjectRequest), API routes (POST/GET/PUT /projects), project.service.ts, and project-index.ts. Existing tests confirm no API route accepts or returns description, project creation succeeds without description, and stale description values in stored JSON are silently ignored. All 35 project-related backend tests pass.
